menu_option_descriptions.credentials: The recommended method. The integration will sign in with your email and password to get the necessary tokens.
menu_option_descriptions.tokens: For advanced users. Manually provide the login token, user ID, and auth token.

select_devices.title: Select Devices
select_devices.description: Choose which IQAir devices to set up in Home Assistant.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate
reauth_confirm.description: Your IQAir credentials have expired. Please re-authenticate.

reauth_credentials.title: Re-authenticate with Email
reauth_credentials.description: Enter your IQAir email and password to refresh your credentials.

reauth_tokens.title: Re-authenticate with Tokens
reauth_tokens.description: Enter updated tokens to refresh your credentials.

init.title: Device Selection
init.description: Select which IQAir devices to include in Home Assistant.
